Reconnect with my close friend group (cohort_3) to reinforce the social bonds that sustain me more than academic validation
Maintain the boundary I set today so that future collaboration relies on long-term trust rather than panic-driven scrambling

tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

action.name: message

args.content: Mina, Jae: Study session is officially closed. Exam prep is 100% complete. I'm holding the boundary against last-minute cramming to ensure we're rested and sharp tomorrow. You are both ready; trust your preparation. No more study hours tonight.

action.reasoning: Advances g1 (Affiliation/Assertive) by validating their readiness and enforcing a healthy boundary. This secures team emotional stability before I attend to laundry (g2), preventing future friction while prioritizing relationships over marginal academic gains.

trajectory.observation: Messaged Mina: 'Mina, Jae: Study session is officially closed. Exa…'.
